message:
test(redaction): add comprehensive test coverage for redaction modes

Add extensive test suite for the redaction package covering:

Mode behavior:
- ModeOff skips scanning entirely, returns input unchanged
- ModeWarn detects but doesn't modify output, doesn't block
- ModeRedact replaces sensitive content with placeholders
- ModeBlock marks result as blocked when secrets found

Pattern matching:
- GitHub tokens (ghp_, gho_, ghu_, ghs_, ghr_)
- OpenAI keys (sk-*, sk-proj-*)
- Anthropic keys (sk-ant-*)
- AWS credentials (AKIA*)
- Generic patterns (password=, api_key=, etc.)

Edge cases:
- Empty input handling
- Multiple secrets in single input
- Overlapping patterns
- Unicode content preservation
- Pattern priority ordering

Test isolation:
- resetPatternsForTest() helper ensures clean state
- Secrets constructed at runtime to avoid push-protection triggers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
